name: Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. In another large bowl, whisk together the oil, pumpkin, and water. Add the eggs one at a time, stirring well after each addition.
3. In a small plastic bag, mix together chopped nuts and raisins with 2 tablespoons flour. Shake until well coated.
4. Stir the mixture of nuts, raisins, and additional flour into the pumpkin mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan(s) and bake at 325°F (165°C) for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
6. Check the bread at the 1-hour mark to ensure it is cooked through, as oven temperatures can vary.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
